concerns.text: FR-003 and US-1 explicitly require downloading both Dst AND Kp indices. Tasks T011-T013 only mention downloading Dst. There is no task to ingest Kp data, leaving FR-003 partially unimplemented.

FR-005 mandates applying multiple-comparison correction (Bonferroni or Benjamini-Hochberg). While T022 computes p-values, no task explicitly implements the correction logic or applies it to the results before output.

FR-007 requires explicit justification citing the specific NOAA SWPC definition document for 'severe storms'. Task T034 mentions 'justification citing NOAA SWPC definition document' but lacks a specific task to implement the citation mechanism or ensure the specific document reference is included in output artifacts.

SC-004 and FR-012 require measuring total execution time and peak RAM usage for the *entire* pipeline. Task T030 only covers this for US2 (analysis). There is no task to instrument the full pipeline (ingest + align + analyze) to verify the global 6h/7GB constraint.

FR-006 (Assumptions section) and US-1 require filtering non-recurrent storms (distinct minima separated by ≥24 hours). Task T016 mentions this logic, but the task description is vague ('Implement logic to filter...') and does not explicitly link to the 24-hour recovery rule or the exclusion of recurrent activity periods required by the spec.
